stack: "Noto Sans JP", "Hiragino Kaku Gothic ProN", "Hiragino Sans", "Yu Gothic", "Meiryo", sans-serif
notes: Best cross-platform. Noto covers Win/Linux, Hiragino for Mac, Yu Gothic/Meiryo fallback.

stack: "Hiragino Sans", "Hiragino Kaku Gothic ProN", "Noto Sans JP", "Yu Gothic", "Meiryo", sans-serif
notes: Mac-first. Falls back to Noto on Win/Linux.

stack: "Yu Gothic Medium", "Yu Gothic", "Hiragino Kaku Gothic ProN", "Noto Sans JP", "Meiryo", sans-serif
notes: SmartHR approach. Needs Medium weight trick on Windows for correct rendering.

stack: "Inter", "Noto Sans JP", "Hiragino Kaku Gothic ProN", "Yu Gothic", sans-serif
notes: Most common pairing for modern JP SaaS. Inter handles Latin, Noto handles CJK.
Modern Vercel-style. Geist for Latin, Noto for CJK.

stack: "SF Pro JP", "SF Pro Display", "Hiragino Kaku Gothic ProN", "Meiryo", "Helvetica Neue", sans-serif
notes: Apple Japan approach. SF Pro JP includes JP glyphs. Mac-only primary.

stack: system-ui, -apple-system, BlinkMacSystemFont, "Segoe UI", "Noto Sans JP", "Hiragino Sans", sans-serif
notes: Safest cross-platform. Uses OS default for each platform.
